title: Apply for National Science Camp 2026
description: Apply for Tropical Trails and Tales Science Camp 2026.

config.subject: Your National Summer Camp Programme application has been received

steps.title: Tell us about the camper
steps.description: This camp is for campers ages 12 to 15.

steps.title: Who should camp staff contact in an emergency?
steps.description: Give details for another adult we can contact if we cannot reach you.

steps.description: Photos or videos may be used to show National Summer Camp Programme activities.

options.label:
I declare that:

* the information I gave is correct
* I am the camper's parent or guardian
* I understand the information may be checked
* I have read the camp rules
* I have talked with the camper about the camp rules
* I understand applying does not mean the camper has a place at camp
* I understand the camper may have to leave camp if they break the camp rules or put anyone at risk

required.error: You must confirm before submitting the application

nextSteps.title: What happens next
nextSteps.content:
Your application has been submitted.

The Ministry will review the application and contact you about the next steps.

Applying does not mean the camper has a place.
